name: The Tent Folds In on Itself
text: The big top collapses. Each player rolls a six-sided die for each creature they control. Each creature whose controller rolled a 3 or less is buried in canvas and destroyed. Creatures that survive 'help fold the tent' and get a -1/-1 counter from the heavy lifting. You then create a Treasure for each creature destroyed this way, scavenged from the wreckage. The carnival is, naturally, fully insured.
flavorText: It went up in four hours. It came down in four seconds and one lawsuit.
